emails.subject: bullets, please
emails.body: bullets, please Bullets, please. Thanks, K.

emails.subject: RE: Bullets, please
emails.body: RE: Bullets, please Sold a total of 65,795MMBtu of fuel sales starting 01/15/02 through 01/18/02. 5,000MMBtu were sold to Richardson Products and 60,795MMBtu were sold to Astra Power. The average price was $2.18 on an average index price of $2.15. Received Richardson Products confirmation letter to move the $1.6 million received designated to apply to December 2002 business to account for November 2002 gas sales. To: Lohman, TK; Lokay, Michelle; McConnell, Mark; Y'barbo, Paul
